notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Buttons manager remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.16+.
Main menu section label is 'Подарки / Лид-магниты'; inside the flow the professional term is 'Лид-магниты'.
Fixes lead-magnet menu placement after admin text/material input: the next step is sent as a fresh bottom message and older lead-magnet menus are neutralized/deleted with retries.
Typed URL material is stored as a URL, not as a MAX link-preview attachment.
Active lead-magnet conditions remain: access for everyone, current-channel subscription, comment under post, keyword in comment, subscription to up to 5 channels.
Lead conditions are persisted after final save so newly created post settings keep the selected condition.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
Audit: still layered; after acceptance merge admin-flow wrappers into one clean core module.
